### Quick dosing summary for Dr. Martinez
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  
**Config version:** v3  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Age | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose/patient | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance | Status |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 mo | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | **1.86 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min | Stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan |
| CU-002 | 18 mo | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | **1.09 mg** | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min | Responding well; weight gain improving |
| CU-003 | 51 mo | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27 |

### PK model stability
Based on the latest dosing file alone, **nothing looks obviously unstable**:
- clearance values look internally consistent across patients,
- no outlier dosing entries jump out,
- patient notes suggest acceptable clinical response/tolerance so far.

That said, this is **not a full live PK model health check** — it’s a review of the latest configured dosing parameters and patient annotations. If you want, I can format this into a short report for Dr. Martinez.
